challenges.title: Image with Text Wrap
challenges.description: Create an article layout where an image is floated to the left and text wraps around it. Include a caption below the image.
requirements: Image has margin to separate from text

solution.html:
Image

This is an image caption

This text wraps around the floated image on the left side. The float property was originally designed for this purpose. Notice how the text flows naturally around the image, creating a layout similar to what you'd see in magazines and newspapers.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
solution.explanation: The image container is floated left with 200px width. Margin-right and margin-bottom provide spacing. The caption is part of the floated container so it stays with the image.

challenges.title: Two-Column Float Layout
challenges.description: Create a simple two-column layout using floats. Left column (sidebar) should be 30% width, right column (content) should be 70%.
requirements: Both columns have a background color and padding

solution.html:
Sidebar

This is the sidebar (30% width)

Main Content

This is the main content area (70% width)
solution.explanation: Both columns are floated left with percentage widths totaling 100%. The clearfix on the container prevents collapse.

challenges.title: Float Gallery with Clearfix
challenges.description: Create a responsive image gallery using floats. Items should display in a 3-column grid with proper spacing and clearfix.
requirements: 3 columns of gallery items using float
Responsive: 2 columns on medium screens, 1 on small

solution.html:
1
2
3
4
5
6
solution.explanation: Items are floated left with width 31.33% + 2% margins = ~33.33% each. Media queries adjust columns for smaller screens. Clearfix prevents gallery collapse.

challenges.title: Article with Pull Quote and Image
challenges.description: Create a full article page that uses floats for both an image and a pull quote, with text wrapping around both.
requirements: Article with a title and multiple paragraphs
A floated image (left) in the first paragraph
A floated pull quote (right) in the middle of the article
Pull quote should have a distinct style (border, background)

solution.html:
The Art of CSS Floats

Featured Image CSS floats have been a fundamental tool in web design since the early days. Originally created to allow text to wrap around images, floats became the primary method for creating complex layouts before the advent of Flexbox and Grid.

The float property can take values of left, right, or none. When an element is floated, it is removed from the normal flow and shifted to the left or right edge of its container. Text and inline elements will then wrap around the floated element.

Float is not dead - it's simply found its proper place in the CSS toolbox.

While modern layout methods like Flexbox and CSS Grid have largely replaced floats for page layout, floats are still the best tool for specific use cases. Text wrapping around images, pull quotes, and drop caps are all excellent examples where floats remain the most practical solution.

Understanding floats is also essential for maintaining legacy codebases. Many older websites and frameworks still rely on float-based layouts. Knowing how floats work, how to clear them, and how to fix common issues is a valuable skill for any web developer.
solution.explanation: The image is floated left, and the pull quote is floated right. Text wraps around both naturally. The pull quote has a distinctive left border and larger italic font.

challenges.title: Float-Based Magazine Layout
challenges.description: Create a magazine-style homepage that uses floats for multiple layout components including a featured article with image wrap, a two-column story list, a three-column gallery, and a footer. Use clearfixes appropriately.
requirements: Header with magazine title and navigation
Featured article with floated image and wrapping text

solution.html:
Magazine

This is the featured article with a floated image on the left. The text wraps around the image naturally. This is the classic float use case that remains relevant even with modern CSS.
